headline: Hershey’s (NYSE:HSY) Q1 CY2026 Sales Beat Estimates
summary: Chocolate company Hershey (NYSE:HSY) reported Q1 CY2026 results beating Wall Street’s revenue expectations, with sales up 10.6% year on year to $3.10 billion. Its non-GAAP profit of $2.35 per share was 14.9% above analysts’ consensus estimates.

content.title: Hershey’s (NYSE:HSY) Q1 CY2026 Sales Beat Estimates
content.summary: Chocolate company Hershey (NYSE:HSY) reported Q1 CY2026 results beating Wall Street’s revenue expectations, with sales up 10.6% year on year to $3.10 billion. Its non-GAAP profit of $2.35 per share was 14.9% above analysts’ consensus estimates.

headline: Hershey beats Q1 expectations but dips on softer guidance outlook
summary: The Hershey Company (NYSE:HSY) reported stronger-than-expected first-quarter results on Thursday, though shares slipped 1. 6% as investors focused on a slightly weaker-than-expected full-year outlook.

headline: Cocoa Prices Jump as Chocolate Demand Remains Steady
summary: July ICE NY cocoa (CCN26 ) on Thursday closed up +159 (+4.66%), and May ICE London cocoa #7 (CAK26 ) closed up +104 (+4.13%). Cocoa prices rallied sharply on Thursday, with NY cocoa posting a 2-week high and London cocoa posting a 2.5-month high. Signs that consumer demand for chocolate...
